description: Sage Intacct Web Services API credentials. Uses a two-layer auth model: Sender credentials (app-level) plus User credentials (session-level).

CompanyId.title: Company ID
CompanyId.description: Sage Intacct Company ID (e.g., SoundPostMPP-DEV). Found in Company > Admin.

SenderId.title: Web Services Sender ID
SenderId.description: Sender ID from your Sage Intacct Marketplace Web Services subscription.

SenderPassword.title: Sender Password
SenderPassword.description: Password associated with the Web Services Sender ID.

UserId.title: User ID
UserId.description: Sage Intacct user login (ideally a dedicated Web Services user, not a human login).

UserPassword.title: User Password
UserPassword.description: Password for the Sage Intacct user.

EntityId.title: Entity ID (Optional)
EntityId.description: For multi-entity shared companies, the specific entity/location to connect to. Leave blank for single-entity companies.
